stock_inventory_context.health_check_reason: 防禦底倉可續抱，未見明確 thesis break。
stock_inventory_context.recent_trigger_summary: 近一週未觸發買進/賣出
stock_inventory_context.invalidation_condition: PEI：承保利潤、投資組合或資本配置惡化超出防禦持股容忍度。；APEX：收盤跌破 484.51，或跌破 485.77 後無法快速收復。
stock_inventory_context.data_limitations: 報價：yfinance / finance snapshot 2026-06-24 21:51 Asia/Taipei（開盤後早段，非純 20:45 盤前）；K線窗 2026-06-17~2026-06-23（目前只有 2026-06-23 美股K線報告）；PEI conditional risk screen，官方 filings/法說/consensus/估值/流動性模型未逐檔補齊；產業thesis離線模式，SEC/GDELT未網路補強。

portfolio_risk.model_portfolio_size: 0%; inventory-holding context only, no model position opened
portfolio_risk.downside_or_stop_distance: not independently verified in inventory-scope batch
portfolio_risk.hedge_posture: No hedge; model portfolio remains cash for this name until evidence clears
portfolio_risk.add_rule: Open or add only after full PEI specialist workflow confirms thesis, trigger, price context, liquidity, and risk/reward
portfolio_risk.trim_rule: 防禦底倉可續抱，未見明確 thesis break。
portfolio_risk.exit_rule: PEI：承保利潤、投資組合或資本配置惡化超出防禦持股容忍度。；APEX：收盤跌破 484.51，或跌破 485.77 後無法快速收復。
portfolio_risk.max_loss_posture: 0 units at risk because inventory-scope model size is 0%
portfolio_risk.monitoring_cadence: Daily price and weekly fundamentals while held in inventory watch universe
